about.title: About CogniCare
about.text1: CogniCare is your trusted companion in cognitive health management. Our platform combines cutting-edge technology with healthcare expertise to deliver personalized cognitive development programs tailored to your unique needs.
about.text2: Whether you're looking to improve memory, enhance focus, or maintain cognitive wellness, CogniCare provides the tools and support you need on your journey to better brain health.

download.title: Get Started Today
download.subtitle: Download CogniCare and begin your cognitive health journey

rneVerification.title: RNE Verification
rneVerification.subtitle: Automated AI-powered organization identity verification system

upload.title: Upload RNE Document
upload.description: Upload your official RNE registration document for AI-powered analysis and validation
upload.dropSubtitle: PDF, JPG or PNG — up to 10 MB
upload.phoneHint: An AI agent will call this number for identity verification
upload.consentTitle: Consent to AI Processing & Voice Verification
upload.consentText: I consent to AI analysis of the uploaded document and agree to receive an automated verification call. Data is processed securely and in compliance with privacy regulations.

info.step2: AI analyzes, validates, and extracts data
info.step3: AI agent calls to confirm identity
info.securityText: End-to-end encrypted. Compliant with GDPR and local data protection regulations.

processing.title: AI Analysis in Progress
processing.doNotClose: Please keep this page open during processing

analysis.title: Document Analysis Complete
analysis.subtitle: AI has successfully analyzed your RNE document
analysis.proceedInfo: Proceed to voice verification to finalize

call.title: AI Voice Verification
call.preparingDesc: An AI agent will call the provided number. Please ensure the phone is available and ready to answer.
call.inProgress: Call in progress — AI verification active
call.retryInfo: If the call fails or goes unanswered, you will have the option to retry. Ensure the phone is reachable.
call.q1: Hello, this is an automated AI verification call from CogniCare. Can you please confirm your organization name?
call.a1: Yes, this is our organization. We submitted our RNE document for verification.
call.q2: Thank you. Could you please provide or confirm your RNE registration number?
call.a2: Our registration number matches what we submitted in the document.
call.q3: Perfect. Can you confirm the full name of the authorized legal representative?
call.a3: The legal representative information is as stated in the official registration documents.

decision.approvedDesc: Your organization identity has been successfully verified. Your account is now fully activated.
decision.rejectedDesc: We were unable to verify your organization. Please review the rejection reason and try again.
decision.reviewDesc: Your submission requires manual review by our team. You will be notified within 24-48 hours.
decision.rejectedReason: The submitted document could not be fully cross-referenced with the national registry. One or more extracted fields failed validation. Please ensure the document is current and unmodified.
decision.reviewText: Our compliance team will review your submission within 24–48 hours. You will receive an email notification with the final decision.
decision.notifyText: A verification report has been sent to your registered email address.

errors.fileType: Only PDF, JPG, or PNG files are accepted
errors.fileSize: File must be smaller than 10 MB
errors.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number

events.uploading: Uploading RNE document to secure server...
events.uploaded: Document uploaded and queued for AI processing
events.callConnected: Call connected — AI verification in progress

features.title: Comprehensive Care, Simplified
features.subtitle: CogniCare provides a robust suite of tools designed to support every aspect of cognitive health management.

ai.title: AI-Powered Insights
ai.desc: Leverage advanced analytics to track progress, identify patterns, and receive actionable recommendations for better outcomes.

pecs.title: PECS & TEACCH Tools
pecs.desc: Utilize industry-standard frameworks like Picture Exchange Communication System and TEACCH for structured, visual learning.

secure.title: Secure & Compliant
secure.desc: Built with data privacy at its core, ensuring all patient and organizational data is encrypted and handled with the utmost care.

collaboration.title: Collaborative Hub
collaboration.desc: A unified platform connecting organization leaders, specialists, and families for seamless communication and care coordination.

step4.desc: Monitor progress in real-time and use AI insights to optimize care strategies.

pecsCreator.title: PECS Board Creator
pecsCreator.subtitle: Picture Exchange Communication System
pecsCreator.childRequired: Please select a child from the dashboard first.
pecsCreator.titleCardRequired: Title and at least one card required.

phase1.name: Phase I — Physical Exchange
phase1.description: The child learns to exchange a single picture for a highly desired item.
phase1.criteria: Child independently exchanges a picture with minimal prompting in 8/10 trials.
phase1.tips: Use highly motivating items. Two adults recommended.

phase2.name: Phase II — Distance & Persistence
phase2.description: The child travels to the communication partner and uses the picture across settings.
phase2.criteria: Child travels to book, selects picture, and approaches partner independently.
phase2.tips: Gradually increase distance. Practice in different rooms.

phase3.name: Phase III — Picture Discrimination
phase3.description: The child discriminates between two or more pictures.
phase3.criteria: Child consistently selects the correct picture from 5+ pictures in 8/10 trials.
phase3.tips: Start with preferred vs. non-preferred, then preferred vs. preferred.

phase4.name: Phase IV — Sentence Structure
phase4.description: The child constructs simple sentences using "I want" + item picture.
phase4.criteria: Child independently constructs "I want + [item]" sentence strips.
phase4.tips: Introduce the "I want" icon. Place on strip, then add item picture.

phase5.name: Phase V — Responsive Requesting
phase5.description: The child uses PECS to answer "What do you want?"
phase5.criteria: Child responds to "What do you want?" within 5 seconds.
phase5.tips: Begin with a delay between question and prompting.

phase6.name: Phase VI — Commenting
phase6.description: The child spontaneously comments on their environment.
phase6.criteria: Child spontaneously comments using sentence starters.

pecsCreator.emptyState: No cards added yet. Add your first PECS card above.
